name: X-Golf Annapolis
address: 167 Jennifer Rd Suite Y, Annapolis, MD 21401
about: X-Golf Annapolis is an indoor golf simulator venue featuring state-of-the-art technology for realistic golf simulation. The facility offers 7 simulator bays, each accommodating up to 6 people, with options for both group and individual play. Pricing is charged per bay per hour, with rates being $65 for groups and $45 for single players. The venue is designed for play, training, and entertainment, complemented by a full bar, food service, and various amenities. X-Golf Annapolis caters to a diverse range of patrons, including casual players, serious golfers, families, and corporate groups seeking a comprehensive indoor golf experience.
why_golfers_like_it: Unparalleled accuracy and realism through advanced camera systems, infrared lasers, and impact sensors
Comprehensive amenities including a full bar, lounge, and food service with all-day breakfast options
Flexible booking options for various group sizes and customizable events with private bay access

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen service with all-day breakfast options, catering available for events

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art indoor golf simulator system with camera, laser, and sensor technology

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Rental clubs are available for $10 per booking. You can also use your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, X-Golf Annapolis has a full kitchen and bar with food and beverages available for purchase.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: On average, it takes one golfer one hour to play 18 holes. Each additional person in a group will add approximately one hour to play 18 holes.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, children of all ages are welcome. Guests under 18 should be supervised by an adult when playing.
